### Problem
<!-- What user problem does this solve? Avoid jumping straight to a solution. -->

### Proposed change
<!-- What would you like the pipeline to do differently? -->

### Alternatives considered
<!-- What other approaches did you think about? Why is the proposed one preferred? -->

### Scope
- [ ] Affects an existing specialist
- [ ] Adds a new specialist or skill
- [ ] Changes the strategist / orchestration
- [ ] Changes the data module / Allium guardrails
- [ ] Documentation only
